items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for loyalty access.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that loyalty customers receive earlier access (30 days vs 7 days). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this specific requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for loyalty access, but there is no evidence of its implementation or functionality, leading to an inconclusive result.
